findings.title: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed
findings.evidence: Probe reported computed root colorScheme='normal'; dark-mode screenshots were not separately captured in pilot.

principles.summary: Pending active keyboard/focus/input-modality test; screenshot/DOM evidence is not treated as a pass.
Pending active wayfinding/search/menu-flow test; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
Substantial advertising/analytics chrome around editorial content

findings.title: Substantial advertising/analytics chrome around editorial content
findings.evidence: HAR/probe show 150 requests and external script hosts: www.theverge.com, www.gstatic.com, config.aps.amazon-adsystem.com, client.aps.amazon-adsystem.com, cdn.cookielaw.org, www.googletagservices.com, cdn.concert.io, pub.doubleverify.com, assets.zephr.com, cdn.bullwhip.cloud.

principles.summary: Desktop/mobile layout primitives showed no horizontal overflow.
Homepage core task appears available; task completion flow not exercised.
LCP above good threshold (10.4s); LCP above good threshold (12.2s); Total blocking time is high (1143ms)

findings.title: LCP above good threshold (12.2s)
findings.suggestedFix: Improve LCP by prioritizing the hero/content resource, reducing render-blocking work, and optimizing server/critical CSS delivery.

findings.title: Total blocking time is high (1143ms)
findings.suggestedFix: Reduce main-thread JavaScript by splitting, deferring, and removing non-critical third-party work.

findings.title: axe found 5 violation groups
findings.evidence: axe violations: color-contrast(serious,10 nodes), link-in-text-block(serious,1 nodes), link-name(serious,1 nodes), list(serious,1 nodes), region(moderate,2 nodes)

principles.summary: Lighthouse best-practices score 0.73; failed audits include largest-contentful-paint, errors-in-console, interactive, third-party-cookies, valid-source-maps.
Discoverability and Lighthouse SEO evidence did not raise a finding.

findings.title: Large third-party/network surface
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 150 requests; third-party count=97, third-party bytes=1681924. Script hosts include www.theverge.com, www.gstatic.com, config.aps.amazon-adsystem.com, client.aps.amazon-adsystem.com, cdn.cookielaw.org, www.googletagservices.com, cdn.concert.io, pub.doubleverify.com.

principles.summary: Pending active no-JS/offline/reload resilience test; manifest/service-worker presence alone is not treated as a pass.
html lang='en-US'; locale/deeper i18n flows not tested.
Pending active consent/account/commerce-flow review for dark patterns; passive homepage evidence is not treated as a pass.
Heavy transfer on initial load (4.3 MB)

findings.title: Heavy transfer on initial load (4.3 MB)
findings.evidence: HAR summary recorded 150 requests and 4253635 transferred bytes.

principles.summary: Rigorous same-session memory leak test has not been run yet; previous single/coarse heap data is not treated as a pass.

verdict: Homepage pilot: 7 principles with issues; top concerns are high be-fast-and-stable: LCP above good threshold (10.4s); high be-inclusive: axe found 5 violation groups; medium be-sustainable: Heavy transfer on initial load (4.3 MB).
_pilotCaveats: Pilot judgments are homepage-only and intended to validate schema/aggregation before scaling.
Axe was injected via Runtime.evaluate; BBC CSP blocked unsafe eval so BBC a11y is Lighthouse/probe-only in this pass.
Memory evidence is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
_caveats: Memory principle pending rigorous same-session recheck; no pass/issue asserted from single/coarse heap snapshots.
Passive-only principles patched: trustworthy/resilient/natural-interactions/guided-navigation require active flow testing and are not counted as passes.
Supplemental Lighthouse/trace/reduced-motion evidence collected and merged.
